data.ref: feature decomp approved — 6 vectors, 12 REQ keys, design phase open

data.rationale: sdlc_graph.py exports package and worker per ADR-002. 6-asset bootstrap graph (intent, requirements, feature_decomp, design, code, unit_tests), 5 edges with correct operators and contexts. All F_D evaluators wired with commands per ADR-003. Worker(id=claude_code) covers all 5 jobs. __init__.py re-exports public API per ADR-001. All Implements: tags present. No V2 features. Importable via src/ layout.

All 12 REQ keys in Package.requirements are covered by Validates: tags. REQ-F-GRAPH-001/002, REQ-F-GATE-001, REQ-F-CMD-001/2/3, REQ-F-TAG-001/2, REQ-F-COV-001, REQ-F-BOOT-002, REQ-F-DOCS-001 tagged in test_sdlc_graph.py. REQ-F-BOOT-001 tagged in tests/__init__.py. REQ-F-COV-001/TAG-001/2 double-covered in test_gaps.py. 32 tests, 32 pass, 0 failures.

criteria: Human confirms: (1) .ai-workspace/uat/sandbox_report.json shows all_pass: true, (2) all e2e scenarios pass end-to-end in the sandbox, (3) every feature acceptance criterion is demonstrated by at least one scenario. No feature is shipped without sandbox proof.

data.evidence: REQ-F-BOOT-V2.yml covers BOOT-003/004/005 (three-layer install). REQ-F-TEST-V2.yml covers TEST-003 (version sandboxing). All 28 REQ keys now covered 28/28.

ADR-005 covers REQ-F-BOOT-003/004/005 (three-layer install: .genesis/spec/ immutable layer, starter local spec generation, reinstall idempotency). ADR-004 covers REQ-F-MDECOMP-001..005. REQ-F-TEST-003 design: pin PYTHONPATH=builds/python/src/:.genesis in tests_pass and e2e_tests_exist evaluator commands. All features have ADR coverage. Tech stack unchanged. No implementation details in spec.

4 modules written to .ai-workspace/modules/. MOD-001 sdlc_graph (rank 1, no deps) — graph definition. MOD-002 backlog (rank 1, no deps) — backlog management. MOD-003 install (rank 2, depends MOD-001) — bootstrap installer, copies sdlc_graph.py to .genesis/spec/. MOD-004 package_init (rank 3, depends MOD-001/002/003) — public API and version. DAG is acyclic. All 13 features covered.

criteria: Human confirms: module boundaries are clean, dependency DAG is acyclic, build order is sensible, every feature is assigned, no circular dependencies.

data.evidence: REQ-F-TEST-003: tests_pass and e2e_tests_exist evaluator commands now include PYTHONPATH=builds/python/src/:.genesis prefix in both sdlc_graph.py and genesis_sdlc.py. REQ-F-BOOT-003: install_immutable_spec() added to install.py — copies sdlc_graph.py to {target}/.genesis/spec/genesis_sdlc.py, creates __init__.py, always replaced on reinstall. REQ-F-BOOT-004: install_sdlc_starter_spec() now returns already_exists if local spec exists — never overwrites Layer 3. REQ-F-BOOT-005: install() now calls install_immutable_spec() (step 2, always replaced) then install_sdlc_starter_spec() (step 2b, never overwrites). _verify() checks immutable_spec. REQ tags added to install.py. Build order respected: MOD-001 sdlc_graph.py patched first, MOD-003 install.py second.
All 28 REQ keys covered. check-req-coverage confirms passes=true. REQ-F-TEST-003 covered by REQ-F-TEST-V2.yml.
6 ADRs cover all 28 REQ keys. ADR-006 added for REQ-F-TEST-003 (test version sandboxing / PYTHONPATH pinning). Design coherent.

4 modules unchanged: MOD-001 sdlc_graph (rank 1, no deps), MOD-002 backlog (rank 1, no deps), MOD-003 install (rank 2, depends MOD-001), MOD-004 package_init (rank 3, depends MOD-001/002/003). DAG acyclic. All 28 REQ keys assigned. Build order: MOD-001/002 → MOD-003 → MOD-004. ADR-006 (REQ-F-TEST-003) falls under MOD-001 (sdlc_graph.py — evaluator commands). No module structure change required.

All three modules implemented. REQ-F-TEST-003: PYTHONPATH=builds/python/src/:.genesis added to tests_pass evaluator in sdlc_graph.py; same fix plus e2e_tests_exist in genesis_sdlc.py. ADR-006 written. REQ-F-BOOT-003: install_immutable_spec() added to install.py — copies sdlc_graph.py to .genesis/spec/genesis_sdlc.py, creates __init__.py, always replaced on reinstall. REQ-F-BOOT-004: install_sdlc_starter_spec() returns already_exists if local spec exists — never overwrites Layer 3. REQ-F-BOOT-005: install() calls install_immutable_spec() (step 2, always replaced) then install_sdlc_starter_spec() (step 2b, never overwrites); _verify() checks immutable_spec. REQ tags added to install.py. Build order respected: MOD-001 first, MOD-003 second, MOD-004 (package_init/__init__.py) unchanged.
